content:
You are running Red Team adversarial QA for M55 milestone. Read .gsd-t/charters/m55-charter.md for scope, then run the protocol at templates/prompts/red-team-subagent.md against ALL 5 M55 domains.

M55 commits to attack: bb514db (D1 cli-preflight), 7b9e013 (D2 parallel-cli + 5.57x proof), a0bef17 (D3 ratelimit-probe + map), 998f373 (D4 context-brief), b916d77 (D5 verify-gate + judge + wire-in).

REQUIRED: ≥5 broken patches you can prove the test suite catches. Falsifiable success criterion #7 of M55. Per the charter, the suggested patches to attempt:
1. preflight-skip-on-error (D1)
2. parallel-substrate-bypasses-capture (D2)
3. verify-gate-falsy-true (D5)
4. branch-guard-typo (D1)
5. contract-staleness-ignored (D1)
6. brief-staleness-ignored (D4)

For each: apply the broken patch, run npm test, verify a test fails (the catch), revert. Document each in .gsd-t/red-team-report.md as: PATCH-N, what you broke, which test caught it, the failing assertion text.

VERDICT: GRUDGING PASS (all ≥5 patches caught, no real bugs found) OR FAIL (real bugs found — list them with severity).

You are NOT a worker iter under a supervisor. You ARE the Red Team agent for M55. Run synchronously in this turn. Do not background. Do not say "let me poll." Use Bash to apply patches via git, run npm test, capture exit codes and key test names. When done, write the full report to .gsd-t/red-team-report.md (replacing the existing file is fine — it has prior milestones' reports), commit the report, and reply with the VERDICT line + bug count + patch-catch summary.

Branch: main. You are authorized to make temporary edits via git apply / git stash for patch testing as long as you revert each patch before moving to the next. NEVER commit a broken patch. Only commit the final red-team-report.md.
